Results of poudriere testport

Attached is the results of poudriere's testport. The first run did find 2 check-plist errors, that I'm not sure are valid, but I added to pkg-plist anyway:

Error: Orphaned: @dirrmtry etc/periodic/daily
Error: Orphaned: @dirrmtry etc/periodic
